sources.claim: AI-based weather modelling market valued at $1.10B in 2025, projected to reach $7.20B by 2033 at CAGR 26.4%
sources.note: Cross-referenced with market.us/report/ai-based-weather-modelling-market — consistent $1.1B base and 26.4% CAGR

sources.claim: Total weather forecasting services market $3.74B in 2026, growing to $5.26B by 2031, CAGR 7.06%; North America leads with 30.9% share
sources.note: Fortune Business Insights corroborates similar total market size figures for 2026

sources.claim: WeatherNext 2 delivers 8× faster forecasts with sub-1-hour temporal resolution; commercialised via Google Cloud BigQuery/Earth Engine
sources.note: Official Google DeepMind announcement; financialcontent.com article corroborates commercial energy trader targeting

sources.claim: NVIDIA launches Earth-2 open model family January 26, 2026 — first fully open accelerated AI weather stack; Earth-2 Medium Range beats GenCast on 70+ variables
Tomorrow.io raises $175M (Feb 2026) for DeepSky satellite constellation; total funding $508M; $100M ARR; $1B+ valuation
sources.note: PRNewswire release confirmed same figures; SpaceNews confirmed additional $35M added in May 2026 bringing total to $210M

sources.claim: NOAA deploys new generation of AI-driven global weather prediction models to operational status in 2026
sources.note: Official US government press release; no contradicting sources found

sources.claim: AI weather forecasting now outperforms traditional models on 90% of metrics; five key transformative innovations detailed
sources.note: Peer-reviewed article published February 2026; consistent with DeepMind Science paper (Dec 2023) findings

sources.claim: WMO World Meteorological Congress formally endorses actions to promote AI for operational forecasts and warnings; 2026/2027 budget $138.7M confirmed
sources.note: Official WMO press release from the 2025 congress

sources.claim: Climavision receives $100M investment for high-resolution AI weather platform; acquired Intersphere April 2024
sources.note: BusinessWire corroborates the Intersphere acquisition on April 30, 2024

sources.publisher: International Renewable Energy Agency (IRENA) via Tomorrow.io blog
sources.claim: IRENA 2024 study: improving 24-hour wind forecasts by 10% reduces European grid balancing costs by €1.5–3B per year
sources.note: IRENA figure cited in multiple secondary sources; direct IRENA report URL not located — cited as [partial verification]. The Weather Company blog references the same order-of-magnitude savings.

sources.claim: Pangu-Weather: 3D high-resolution AI model forecasts global weather 10,000× faster than ensemble NWP; published Nature July 5, 2023
sources.note: arXiv preprint of the Nature paper; final Nature publication confirmed July 2023 in multiple peer sources

sources.claim: AI is quietly powering a revolution in weather prediction, with ECMWF, NOAA, and UK Met Office all running AI models alongside traditional systems
sources.note: Long-form investigative piece corroborating the multi-agency adoption trend

unverified_claims.claim: IRENA 2024 study exact figure of €1.5–3B/year grid balancing savings
unverified_claims.note: Widely cited in trade press but direct IRENA report link not confirmed — treat as directionally accurate, not publishable as a precise figure without further verification

unverified_claims.claim: Market share percentages for individual players (Weather Company 22%, AccuWeather 18%, etc.)
unverified_claims.note: No single authoritative market share breakdown found; percentages are editorial estimates based on relative revenue, brand presence, and analyst commentary across multiple reports
